tasks.description: Add the 8 new prep commands (16 files, 8 pairs in .claude/commands/ and src/.claude/commands/)

Merge temp improvements into existing commands AND ensure ALL command files have descriptive '# ' first lines. Files to merge from temp: kickoff.md, commit-only.md, commit-and-push.md, run-build.md, run-pe.md, run-pm.md, run-qa.md, run-sde.md. Files needing first-line updates only (no temp counterpart): showme.md -> show-me.md ('# Read-only pipeline status report.'), kickoff-complex.md ('# Plan-gated intake for multi-domain or risky changes.'), seed.md ('# Onboard the agent framework into this repository.'). Also rename showme.md to show-me.md in both .claude/commands/ and src/.claude/commands/ to match hyphenated naming convention.
Update CLAUDE.md command tables in both root and src/ (add 8 new prep command rows, rename /showme to /show-me in existing rows)
Final verification: confirm all 19 commands exist in both directories, byte-identical invariant, no stale short-name references, showme.md gone, temp/ gone, all first lines descriptive
